memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  co-regent of Salerno, 989; Prince of Salerno, 999.  Adherent of the Emperor Otto III, 1002.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne於0988年1月6日出生在義大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾薩利爾諾時，他的父親Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno38歲，母親Sichelgaita di Benevento22歲。他和Gaitelgrima de Bénévent至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1027年1月7日在義大利享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne于0988年1月6日出生在意大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾薩利爾諾时，他的父亲Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno38岁，母亲Sichelgaita di Benevento22岁。他和Gaitelgrima de Bénévent至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1027年1月7日在意大利享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salerne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Sal, Salvatore, Pasquale, Carmine, Rocco, Aldo, Nunzio, Enrico, Francesco, Gaspare.
Italian (southern): habitational name from the city of Salerno in Campania.

variants.name: Salierno
meanings: Italian (mainly Campania): variant with metaphony of   Salerno  .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Toscan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Palma, Alessandro, Angelo, Antonio, Domenic, Donato, Gennaro, Ivano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Toscano  .

variants.name: Toscano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Mario, Alfredo, Guadalupe, Alfonso, Carlos, Cesar, Jorge, Miguel, Salvador.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Ciro, Sal, Santo, Carlo, Cosimo, Domenico, Filippo, Gino.
Italian and Spanish: habitational name for someone from Tuscany (Italian Toscana).
Italian: from the personal name Toscano from an adjectival derivative of Toscana.

en.lifeSummary: When Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne was born on 6 January 0988, in Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italy, his father, Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno, was 38 and his mother, Sichelgaita di Benevento, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Gaitelgrima de Bénévent. He died on 7 January 1027, in Italy, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne est né le 6 janvier 0988, à Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italie, son père, Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Sichelgaita di Benevento, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Gaitelgrima de Bénévent. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1027, à Italie, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne am 6. Januar 0988 in Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno 38 und seine Mutter Sichelgaita di Benevento 22. Er hatte mit Gaitelgrima de Bénévent mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Januar 1027 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne è nato il il 6 gennaio 0988 nel Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italia, il suo padre, Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Sichelgaita di Benevento, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Gaitelgrima de Bénévent. Morì il 7 gennaio 1027, nel Italia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerneが0988年1月6日にイタリアカンプアニアサラーノサラーノで生まれた時，父Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salernoは38歳，母Sichelgaita di Beneventoは22歳であった。彼はGaitelgrima de Bénéventとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1027年1月7日にイタリアで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne(이)가 0988년 1월 6일 이탈리아 캠파니아 살일른오 살일른오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Sichelgaita di Benevento(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Gaitelgrima de Bénévent(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1027년 1월 7일 이탈리아에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.06 JAN 988–07 JAN 1027: 0988 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6–1027 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7

pt.06 JAN 988–07 JAN 1027: 6 de janeiro de 0988–7 de janeiro de 1027
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 0988, em Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Sichelgaita di Benevento, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Gaitelgrima de Bénévent. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1027, em Itália, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne родился 6 января 0988 г. в местности сеилирно, сеилирно, кампаня, Италия, его отцу по имени Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Sichelgaita di Benevento, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Gaitelgrima de Bénévent. Он умер 7 января 1027 г. в местности Италия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.06 JAN 988–07 JAN 1027: 6 de enero de 0988–7 de enero de 1027
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne nació el 6 de enero de 0988, en Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italia, su papá, Principe di Salerno Ioannes di Salerno, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Sichelgaita di Benevento, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Gaitelgrima de Bénévent. Murió el 7 de enero de 1027, en Italia, a la edad de 39 años.
